tasks.label: 🚀 MOZBUS: INICIAR TUDO (Full Ecosystem)
args: taskkill /F /IM node.exe 2>$null; cd mozbus-backend; node fix-passwords.js; npx prisma db push; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoExit', '-Command', 'npm run start:dev'; cd ../mozbus-web; npm run dev
